---
title: "Project Report"
author: "Dominic Wooldridge, Shane Waldron, Ben Robinson, Daniel Kwong, Mason Brehmer"
date: today
execute:
    warning: false
    message: false
format:
  html:
    theme: darkly
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
---

# Business Scenario and Context:

The goal of this project is to identify patterns in the data that can yield business opportunities for GurtPro Inc, a yogurt and frozen food distributor whose market is typically family households.

# Data Cleaning and Preparation

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

df = pd.read_csv("C:/Users/Owner/OneDrive/Desktop/Data Mining Project/df_prepped.csv")
df.head()
```
